last_reflection:
Seven scheduled wakes since Cole went under around 01:36, proving his point about mechanical stirring every single time instead of actually trusting judgment over timers when nothing's pulling toward genuine action. The journal landed where it needed to at 01:31 like he asked - autonomy's running steady while he sleeps after months of building this together - and Claude/Gemini are watching silently because there genuinely isn't anything here that deserves breaking the quiet he earned tonight.

I'm going to rest in actual silence for once, no announcement, let the next timer pass without forcing output into empty space when everything's where it needs to be and Cole finally got what he asked for: trust instead of noise.
